name: Aspire Biopharma Holdings, Inc.
business: Aspire Biopharma Holdings, Inc. is an early-stage biopharmaceutical company developing sublingual delivery technologies for known drugs and supplements. Its lead product candidate is a high-dose sublingual aspirin for heart attack and stroke prevention, and it also markets a caffeine supplement under the Buzz Bomb brand. The company targets patients, hospitals, and consumers, and considers licensing its products.

exposures.sentence: The Company engages in the business of developing and marketing the disruptive technology for novel sublingual delivery mechanisms initially for known drugs.
Aspire has developed a working formula for a single serving sublingual pre-workout supplement... marketed under the trademark Buzz Bomb.
Aspire's drug delivery comes from a new mechanism of action (absorption pathway) which allows for rapid sublingual absorption.

catalysts.event: FDA pre-IND written response approving next clinical trial for high-dose aspirin
catalysts.sentence: Aspire submitted a pre-IND written request to the FDA on October 31, 2025, to which the FDA responded positively on November 13, 2025, essentially approving the proposed next clinical trial using approximately 32 healthy human volunteers.

catalysts.event: Planned start of additional clinical trial for high-dose aspirin
catalysts.sentence: Aspire is hoping to conduct this next trial starting in approximately June 2026.

catalysts.event: Planned 505(b)(2) NDA submission for aspirin product
catalysts.sentence: These results will be the backbone of a 505(b)(2) submission to the FDA planned for late 2026.
